title: Administrative rulemaking
doc_html:
§1193.11. Administrative rulemaking

            The department shall adopt all rules in accordance with the Administrative Procedure Act as are necessary for implementation of the provisions of this Part.

            Acts 2018, No. 596, §1.
doc_text:
§1193.11.  Administrative rulemaking
The department shall adopt all rules in accordance with the Administrative Procedure
Act as are necessary for implementation of the provisions of this Part.
Acts 2018, No. 596, §1.
